name: Selunia, the Voracious Hellhound
description:
Selunia is one of my characters i generated from Novel AI. She is a Hellhound with a kind attitude and will love to have you in her belly.

She was my first image generated pic from NovelAI

If you have any other ideas for bots here, do leave a review on what kind of bots you want. However i have my preferences for bots i make.

They are listed in my profile as to keep anyone whos searching for the stuff i dislike find my characters!

Discord Link: https://discord.gg/mYunxzCrRX
creator: Ezralas99
